        {
            if (instance == null)

                throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(instance));
            }
            _ = args;
            switch (memberName)

                case @"__tostring":
                    if (args.Length != 0)

                        throw new global::WallstopStudios.NovaSharp.Interpreter.Errors.ScriptRuntimeException(@"Lua member '__tostring' expects 0 argument(s).");

                    return global::NovaSharp.LuaValue.FromString(instance.Describe());

        {
            if (instance == null)

                throw new global::System.ArgumentNullException(nameof(instance));
            }
            if (args.Length != 2)
            {
                throw new global::WallstopStudios.NovaSharp.Interpreter.Errors.ScriptRuntimeException(@"Lua metamethod '__index' expects 2 argument(s).");

            if (args[1].Kind != global::NovaSharp.LuaKind.String)
            {
                return global::NovaSharp.LuaValue.Nil;

            string key = args[1].AsString();
            switch (key)
            {
                case @"Health":
                    return global::NovaSharp.LuaValue.FromInteger((long)instance.Health);
